articles.summary: 就活は、学生が初めて「社会」と向き合う大きな転機です。文部科学省・厚生労働省・総務省による「新規学卒就職者の離職状況」では、**新卒就職者の3年以内離職率が31.5％**となっており、就活時点での企業理解や自己理解の不足が入社後のミスマッチにつながる可能性が指摘されています。また、厚生労働省の調査では、多くの企業が「採用時のコミュニケーション不足や人物理解の難しさ」を課題として挙げています。情報量が多い一方で、正解が見えづらい現代の就活は、学生にとっても企業にとっても“相互理解の難しさ”を内包したプロセスとなっているのです。

As a person who switches context a lot, I wanted an app where I can save my entire workspace of apps and files, across multiple spaces and monitors and launch them in that exact configuration in one click.Lattix can launch your entire workspace, including your apps, files and URLs, across multiple spaces and monitors, in one click. articles.title: Show HN: Tuiql – A keyboard-driven SQL database client in the terminal
articles.summary: Every time I needed to inspect a database, I either had to wait for a bloated GUI client to chew through my RAM or struggle through psql, which isn’t great for actually visualizing data. So I built a TUI database client focused on one thing: connecting fast and letting you browse tables as datagrids and rows as JSON, with near-instant startup and vim-style keyboard navigation.Still in the early days but already handles most of what you would expect from an SQL database client.
